page_metadata.biotools__summary: Robust model-based clustering using a t-mixture model with Box-Cox transformation. Users should have GSL installed. Windows users: consult the README file available in the inst directory of the source distribution for necessary configuration instructions.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Robust model-based clustering using a t-mixture model with Box-Cox transformation. Users should have GSL installed. Windows users: consult the README file available in the inst directory of the source distribution for necessary configuration instructions.
